creative_prompts.portrait: 16-bit pixel art, grayscale base with palette-swap tinting. Young woman with short dark hair, wearing scholar robes. Expression is thoughtful, slightly guarded. Warm amber lighting from a desk lamp.
creative_prompts.voice: Soft-spoken, measured cadence, slight tremor when discussing the Academy. Mid-range pitch, educated vocabulary but not pretentious.
creative_prompts.theme-music: Melancholic piano melody in A minor, builds from single notes to gentle chords. Evokes studying alone in a vast library at night.

dialogue_hooks: [[Elder Aldric]] — her mentor at the Academy

template_properties.overview: A young scholar from the Academy of Starlight.
template_properties.backstory: Sera grew up in the shadow of the Academy.
template_properties.personality_and_motivation: Curious, cautious, fiercely loyal to her mentor.
